title: Leather Robes
description: Simple Resource Pack that replaces leather armor with robes.
body:
This simple Resource Pack replaces leather armor with a robe set.

The new sprites and armor texture are meant to look more like a tunic a mage or simple peasant could wear; it is better fitting for a medieval mod pack.

Additionally, there is no armor overlay, which means the entire set can be dyed to the exact colour you want.



Thank you again for your time!
